title: Section 11B
content: 1[11B. Removal of disqualifications.--The Election Commission may, for reasons to be recorded, remove 2[any disqualification under sub-section (1) of section 11A].]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 40 of 1975, s. 3 (w.e.f. 6-8-1975). 1. Subs. by Act 40 of 1975, s. 5, for "any disqualification under this Chapter" (w.e.f. 6-8-1975).
